features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: You gain a random amount of hit points equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum +1).

features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.description: Your Constitution score increases by 2. You can use this bonus to increase your hit point maximum or to make a Constitution saving throw.

features.name: Breath Weapon
features.description: When you cast the Fireball spell, you can add your Charisma modifier to the spell’s damage roll.
